scope: ACL main-paper round 10 visual/prose iteration for Figure 1 front-story flow and page-5/page-6 material-effect boundary transition.

source_changes.summary: Tightened the opening intervention framing, shortened the Figure 1 bridge, and reworded the contribution list around a claim-bounded evidence-chain protocol.
Added the explicit static-gates-do-not-certify-MDL-mechanism boundary and shortened the Figure 3 bridge to avoid a page-6 orphan fragment.

visual_findings.notes: The page ends with the complete sentence 'Figure 1 gives the schematic roadmap.'
Figure 1 remains fully visible; body text starts with a complete protocol paragraph instead of an orphan sentence fragment.
The material-effect subsection ends the page with the complete sentence 'Figure 3 aids inspection.'
The page begins with a complete static-gate boundary sentence; Figure 3 remains readable and non-cropped.
The evidence-gate table, late tables, Discussion/Limitations/Conclusion, Figure 4, Ethics, and References remain readable and non-overlapping.

verification.command: rg -n "(^|[^A-Za-z])(Overfull|LaTeX Error|Package .* Error|Fatal error|Emergency stop|undefined references|Rerun to get cross-references)" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log
python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k "acl_intro or acl_method or acl_main or results"

verification.result: failed at check_integrity_fingerprint.py after earlier preupload stages passed; fingerprint mismatch covers multiple existing dirty paper/figure/table files

residual_risk: The round improves front-story and material-boundary visual flow but does not refresh the integrity fingerprint or prove final submission completion.
